chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. D- 4082 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge Direction. For hearing of CMA No. 9048/22 (Contempt) --------------- 11.10.2022. Petitioner Muhammad Haneef, in person. Mr. Altamash Arab, Advocate for respondent. Mr. S. Yasir Ahmed Shah, Assistant Attorney General. ------------- This contempt application has been filed in respect of Order dated 15.02.2022, whereby, this Petition was allowed. The operative part reads as under:- ‘In view of the above, we are inclined to set aside the impugned original dated 01.08.2018 and appellate order dated 13.05.2019 passed by the Chairman PAEC and direct the competent authority of respondents/Chairman PAEC for payment of the full-back benefits, besides the reinstatement of the petitioner in service on his original position, within two weeks from the date of order. Let a copy of this order be transmitted to the respondents for compliance.” Thereafter a compliance report has been filed on behalf of the Respondents, wherein, Office Order dated 13.04.2022 has been annexed. The said order re-instates the Petitioner pursuant to the judgment of this Court subject to the final decision of the Hon’ble Supreme Court in Civil Petition filed by the Respondents against the judgment in question. The other condition is in respect of security clearance by HID SPD. As to back benefits, learned Counsel for the Respondent submits that as soon as the Petitioner joins service, the back benefits will be granted. In view of above, the order apparently stands complied with, whereas, the Petitioner, if further aggrieved, may seek appropriate remedy in accordance with law.

As to back benefits, learned Counsel for the Respondent submits that as soon as the Petitioner joins service, the back benefits will be granted. In view of above, the order apparently stands complied with, whereas, the Petitioner, if further aggrieved, may seek appropriate remedy in accordance with law. Listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz P.S.
